info.name: Dataforms
info.summary: Build registers, smart forms and views — no code required.
info.description:
**Dataforms** lets you design **registers** — structured, typed data collections — and the **forms** that feed them, entirely from the browser, with no code.
- Define a register's **schema** from a rich set of field types (text, number, currency, date, single/multi select, email/URL, user/group reference, file attachment, relation, computed and auto fields). - Build **data-entry forms** with sections, and attach **conditional rules**: show/hide fields, require-if, set defaults, validate, and compute values — all from a single rule definition that runs live in the browser and is re-checked on the server. - Browse stored records in **views** with pagination, multi-criteria filter, sort, full-text search and CSV export. - Internal, authenticated use only. Per-register access control (Read / Write / Manage) is enforced on every endpoint, server-side.
Free and open source (AGPL-3.0-or-later). Development is funded by voluntary donations.
info.author: The Dataforms contributors
